title: AEW partnering with national sports bar chain to promote NFL lucha masks
summary: AEW is continuing to lay out a course for selling and promoting their NFL lucha mask line, announcing a partnership Thursday with a national sports bar chain to do so. Centered around the three days of the NFL Draft on April 23-25, AEW and Tom’s Watch Bar will give away a “limited number of AEW […]

title: ODB has pushed for one WWE or NXT appearance before retiring
summary: ODB has been lobbying for one WWE or NXT appearance through TNA’s ongoing partnership with the promotion. Speaking on SoCal Val’s The Velvet Ropes on WrestlingNews.co, TNA veteran ODB opened up about asking for at least one WWE appearance, while also noting that she was one of the wrestlers who spent their entire career in […]
